title: Stamp en Stoot
excerpt: I made this grow-up-with treat on series 4 episode 1 together with Leatitia Solomons. STAMP EN STOOT INGREDIENTS 500 g samp 500 g sugar beans 75 ml oil 2 onions, cut into strips 2 cloves garlic 1 carrot, peeled and cut into blocks 10ml curry powder 1 l warm water …
html:
I made this grow-up-with treat on series 4 episode 1 together with Leatitia Solomons.

 

STAMP EN STOOT

INGREDIENTS

500 g samp
500 g sugar beans
75 ml oil
2 onions, cut into strips
2 cloves garlic
1 carrot, peeled and cut into blocks
10ml curry powder

1 l warm water

5 ml All Spice
2 beef stock cubes

Salt and white pepper

 

METHOD
1.Soak the samp and beans overnight in warm water.
2. Drain the water and rinse it well.
3.Mix the beef stock cubes with the warm water. Cook the samp and beans for 2 hours until soft in the beef stock.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Heat the oil and fry the onions and garlic. Fry the spices together with the onion mixture.
5. Add the carrots.
6. Add 250 ml warm water and cook over low heat until the carrots are soft.
7. Mix together with the samp and beans. Add salt and pepper.
